productDisplayName: Sepia Women Hip Street Blue Tunic
description: Style NoteThe understated and updated design details, fresh from sepia's design studio, makes this top the season's summer essential. Style this with form fitting jeggings and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. For a vintage feel throw on a faded and worn denim jacket, jeans and a floral scarf.Product DetailsBlue strappy tunic, has a straight neck, thin adjustable straps, mock buttoned placket with metallic and crystal buttons, mock pocket detail on both sides of the chest, elasticated and smocked back and frills at the hemMaterial and Care100% cottonGentle hand wash using mild detergentDo not scrub or bleachDry inside outCool iron; do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
